user.title: ChameleonUltra
user.description: Select a ChameleonUltra device to add. Hold the A button on the device before submitting.

data_description.pin: 6-digit BLE pairing PIN. Default is 123456. Leave blank if pairing is disabled on the device.

bluetooth_confirm.title: ChameleonUltra Discovered
bluetooth_confirm.description: Found {name}. Hold the A button on the device before submitting.

data_description.pin: 6-digit BLE pairing PIN. Default is 123456. Leave blank if pairing is disabled on the device.

abort.no_devices_found: No ChameleonUltra devices found. Make sure the device is powered on and within Bluetooth range.

data_description.emulation_hold_time: How long to keep NFC emulation active when the Unlock button is pressed. 3 seconds works well for most locks.
